diagnosis: Opening the showreel reveals the Vimeo control, but the original button's center is hit-tested as its own SVG path, so the capture preflight treats it as occluded. Keep the opener, then neutralize pointer hit-testing on the child SVG/path so the parent button can be armed and hovered unchanged.
abortCriterion: If the Vimeo button is still hidden or still covered after the child SVG/path pointer-events are disabled, stop rather than retrying the same opener again.
